query: SELECT id, name, CHAR_LENGTH(images) as len, SUBSTRING(images, 1, 50) as first50 FROM products WHERE name = 'Mushrooms 250g';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT id, name, CHAR_LENGTH(images) as len, SUBSTRING(images, 1, 50) as first50 FROM products WHERE name = 'Mushrooms 250g';
